title: Fernglass Labs Raises $18M Series A to Expand Growth Engineering Team
summary: Fernglass Labs announced an $18M Series A led by a growth-stage fund, earmarked for expanding the growth engineering and activation teams.

title: Fernglass Labs Ships New Self-Serve Onboarding Flow
summary: A rebuilt onboarding flow cuts time-to-first-value for new workspace signups.

title: Fernglass Labs Publishes Its First Transparency Report
summary: The report covers uptime, incident response times, and data-handling practices for the past two quarters.
